text: Mohamed Salah set to complete move to Al Ittihad. Liverpool agree deal, here we go! Medical booked for the Egyptian forward.
Mohamed Salah is set to complete a move from Liverpool. Deal agreed, here we go — medical scheduled.
Bukayo Saka ruled out with a hamstring injury, Arsenal confirm the winger will be assessed in the coming days.
Ipswich Town working to finalise appointment of Gary O'Neil as head coach. Talks advanced.
Florian Wirtz joins Manchester City from Bayer Leverkusen, here we go! Fee agreed, five year contract.
Kylian Mbappe close to signing new deal at Real Madrid, talks advanced over contract extension.
